title: Microsoft Entra Agent ID: Least-Privilege IAM
description: Assign unique identities to AI agents with Conditional Access and least-privilege RBAC
steps:
Register agent identity
Assign approved roles only
Block high-risk permissions
Scope Azure roles to specific resources
Enable Conditional Access
Audit regularly

title: Write Natural-Language Agent Policies with AWS AgentCore Cedar
description: Use AgentCore Policy GA to enforce deterministic agent-tool access controls via natural language
steps:
Set up AgentCore Gateway with starter toolkit
Write policy in plain English
Review generated Cedar policy
Attach to Gateway and test
Layer multiple policies for defense-in-depth

title: Claude Code Agent Teams Peer-to-Peer Mailbox Communication
description: Use Agent Teams for 2-16 independent Claude instances with peer-to-peer messaging and shared task lists
steps:
Main session becomes Team Lead
Spawn teammates with Task tool and team_name
Define clear role boundaries per agent
Use SendMessage for peer-to-peer coordination
Budget 7x tokens of single session
